matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Digital Humanities is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The MPhil in Digital Humanities is directed by Cambridge Digital Humanities (CDH), a research centre with links across a wide range of faculties and units at Cambridge. The course is administered by the Faculty of English.
